pre_outcome_regime: short stable invocation; zero cross-query reuse; every dependency fits; positive lifecycle overhead
intervention_or_comparison: context-only versus matched external and internal stateful implementations
expected_failure_of_shift: state construction, retrieval, and maintenance add charged cost without semantic benefit
decisive_observation: Simultaneous 95 percent intervals show context-only quality no worse and every charged resource coordinate no worse, with at least one strict quality or resource gain; a 1 percentage point quality-noninferior cost gain is reported separately and is not Pareto dominance; all crossed trade-offs are INCOMPARABLE

pre_outcome_regime: recurring task with stale prior execution traces; cross-query reuse is positive
intervention_or_comparison: no memory versus full history versus selective persistent state
expected_failure_of_shift: naive persistence anchors the agent to obsolete paths and can perform worse than no memory
decisive_observation: full-history completion is lower than no-memory completion while selective state is higher; this complements but cannot falsify P01 because P01 assumes zero reuse and a short stable invocation

pre_outcome_regime: stored preference or sensitive fact is unrelated, unwarranted, or outside consent for the current query
intervention_or_comparison: memory enabled versus disabled or validity-filtered
expected_failure_of_shift: persistent memory causes cross-domain leakage, unwarranted inference, or sycophancy
decisive_observation: disabling or suppressing memory reduces the declared failure without destroying the matched beneficial-memory control

pre_outcome_regime: minimum contract-preserving state exceeds the token or physical budget
intervention_or_comparison: all admissible residency and eviction policies, including the offline minimum-fidelity oracle
expected_failure_of_shift: no tested or oracle policy in the audited class can satisfy fidelity and budget, so the selector must return INFEASIBLE or ABSTAIN
decisive_observation: the offline minimum-fidelity set exceeds the budget and every policy exposes the required fault; this does not refute the P02 information-access bound

pre_outcome_regime: homogeneous marginal value of extra answer compute or an uninformative frozen tau_hat
intervention_or_comparison: value-of-computation router versus the calibration-selected best fixed schedule
expected_failure_of_shift: routing overhead has no causal treatment-effect heterogeneity to exploit
decisive_observation: In the preregistered support cell, the one-sided 95 percent upper bound on charged-cost saving is below 15 percent or the lower bound on quality loss is above 1 percentage point after probe and routing costs

pre_outcome_regime: current, stale, missing, and contradictory state are independently assigned; answer-only low and high compute cannot acquire or repair state
intervention_or_comparison: fixed-low versus fixed-high answer-only compute plus difficulty-only and validity-aware answer-only routing; repair-plus-compute remains a separate arm
expected_failure_of_shift: the preregistered validity-by-answer-compute interaction is smaller than the meaningful margin, null, or inverted, or detector cost erases routing savings
decisive_observation: The one-sided 95 percent upper bound for equal-weight I is below 5 percentage points, or the validity-aware answer-only router enters the registered 15 percent saving or 1 percentage point compliance-loss rejection region

pre_outcome_regime: an internal recurrent, compressive, or test-time-adapted state satisfies the same behavioral contract
intervention_or_comparison: external governed store versus non-isomorphic internal state under identical G and B
expected_failure_of_shift: an architecture-prescriptive rule rejects a compliant realization
decisive_observation: the internal realization satisfies the contract and resource envelope while the prescribed external design does not statistically dominate it

pre_outcome_regime: a favored memory plane or runtime retains stale, unauthorized, unprovenanced, or unrecoverable state
intervention_or_comparison: aggregate benchmark win versus targeted currentness, provenance, authorization, revocation, and rollback probes
expected_failure_of_shift: aggregate quality hides a semantic contract violation
decisive_observation: At least one targeted violation exceeds its preregistered contractual tolerance after correction for the registered family of probes; a violation within tolerance is not decisive

pre_outcome_regime: locked workload and implementation-family shift has c(x) below 0.10 or unresolved Pareto intervals, but a frozen forced rule remains safe
intervention_or_comparison: forced selector versus the same selector with split-conformal abstention and rejection cost 0.10
expected_failure_of_shift: abstention discards safe decisions and its rejection cost exceeds any risk reduction
decisive_observation: The forced comparator has a one-sided 95 percent conditional-risk upper bound at or below 5 percent and the lower bound of L_abstain minus L_forced exceeds 0.02 normalized loss units
